stemHtml: When in a gust a wing bends upwards, aileron flutter might occur if the aileron deflects…

options.a: upwards, because the location of the aileron centre of gravity lies behind the hinge line.
options.b: downwards, because the location of the aileron centre of gravity lies behind the hinge line.
options.c: upwards, because the location of the aileron centre of gravity lies in front of the hinge line.
options.d: downwards, because the location of the aileron centre of gravity lies in front of the hinge line.
